ConstValues.value: "function getPosition() {const iframes = [...document.querySelectorAll('iframe[data-load-complete=true]')];return iframes.map((iframe) => {const pos = iframe?.getBoundingClientRect();if (!pos) return null;const { x, y, width, height } = pos;return { x, y, width, height };});}"

"function getPosition() {const iframes = [...document.querySelectorAll('iframe[data-load-complete=true]')];return iframes.map((iframe) => {const pos = iframe?.getBoundingClientRect();if (!pos) return null;const { x, y, width, height } = pos;return { x, y, width, height };});}"
